## Checklist

- [ ] Followed TDD — tests were written first and cover the change
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e` pass locally
- [ ] UI strings exist in **both** locales (`de` and `en`)
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat(ores): …`)
- [ ] No changes to `e2e/branding-compliance.spec.ts` or the verbatim fansite disclaimer
- [ ] Screenshots attached for UI changes (mobile + desktop if layout changed)
